violations.description: Preventing contamination during storage. — --Food item was not properly protected from potential contamination. -Observed uncovered food in walk in cooler.
Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned adequately. -Observed sides of appliances by fryer need to be wiped down.

Design and construction of floors, walls, and ceilings. — --Floors, walls, and/or ceiling were not constructed or designed to be smooth, nonabsorbent, and easily cleanable. -Observed floor in front of walk in freezer is bare concrete and not a cleanable surface.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…)were not maintained in good repair. Observed hole in wall south of 3 compartment sink that needs to be repaired.

Refrigerated Storage. — --Refrigerator or cold storage was insufficient or ineffective at maintaining potentially hazardous food at a temperature of 41F or less. - Walk-In Cooler should be set at 41F or cooler. Ham tested at 43.7F.

Temperature measuring devices. — --Temperature measuring device was not accurate or not easily readable. -Front refrigeration cooling unit for premade sandwiches reads 39F when thermometer ambient reads 47F.
Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Ventilation hood system was not cleaned properly and/or as frequently as required. - Vents above grill/fryer area in need of cleaning.

Lighting. — --Lighting did not have protective shielding in areas where there is exposed food, clean equipment/utensils, or unwrapped single-service items. - A light fixture in the walk-in cooler was not working and hanging by the wires. Needs to be fixed.
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (2 pts deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
Number, location, accessibility, soap and paper towels provided (3 pts deducted)
Proper storage, labeling, use (3 pts deducted)
Thermometers provided, used, clean, and accurate (1 pt deducted)
Properly designed, located, constructed, operated, maintained, cleaned and chemical test kit provided (2 pts deducted)
